Game.Name: Jissen Bass Fishing Hisshouhou in USA (Japan)
Game.plot: Can you beat the Bass Master Jimmy Houston? Rollin' on dubs and pumpin' up the volume in your pimped out Ford Pinto while blowing the crowd (and your eardrums) away with the mean baseline from killer tracks from groundbreaking pioneers such as Color Me Badd, Right Said Fred and Paperboy.SO MUCH BASS IT WILL KNOCK YOU FLAT ON YOUR A$$!!!~RxCheat: Access the game credits (Japanese version)At the introduction screen (when Katsumasa Yoshida and Jimmy Houston appear) press in order the following buttons.
